title: aneilema terminale
intro: Aneilema terminale, also known as the yellow eyed grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Commelinaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antibacterial and antifungal activities, which help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Aneilema terminale include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
